changes.description: initial release
fixed issue with serviceaccount template
added labels to serviceaccount template
added description for storageSize parameter
added syncwave parameter
fixed issue with default values to keep argocd in sync
fixed issue with claims to keep argocd in sync
(1.0.7) - Add Chart.lock for reproducible installs, refresh resolved dependencies, maintainer dev@stdin.at

charts.name: tpl
charts.description: A library that shall collect certain templates to reuse them among different charts.

changes.description: Initial release
tpl nodeSelector
tpl for sleeptimer that can be used in jobs
tpl to set nodeSelector and tolartion annoations for a namespace
new TPLs to create matchExpressions and matchLabels blocks
new TOLS additionalAnnotations and additionalLabels that allow to set annotations and labels freely on any resource.
nswitched order of tolerations
fixed issue with newline in tpl.sleeptimer
new TPLs to set securityContext and podSecurityContext
new TPLs to set podDisruptionBudget and optimized resources template and schema
new TPLs to create ArgoCD Applications
fixed issue with newline in tpl.sleeptimer
new TPL for namespace object
(1.0.27) Set Chart.yaml type to library so Helm and Artifact Hub treat tpl as a library chart

charts.name: rhacm-setup
charts.description: Setup and configure Advanced Cluster Managerment. Replaces the Chart rhacm-full-stack.

changes.description: Signing Chart
support for tolerations in MultiClusterHub CRD
updated to helper-status-chcker v4
README
added tpl chart
switching some snippets to use global tpl
added support for nodeSelector of the Main instance
(1.0.19) added support to enable or disable KlusterletAddons. For example searchCollector can be disabled to save resources. This can be done for all clusters, or per cluster.
(1.0.20) added support for searchCollector add-on. It is now possible to configure the allowed and denied resources for the searchCollector as well as a storageclass.

charts.name: openshift-virtualization
charts.description: Configure the operator Openshift Virtualization (HyperConverged and HostPath Provisioner)

changes.description: initial release
added new values for enableCommonBootImageImport, deployVmConsoleProxy and enableApplicationAwareQuota which are now directly under spec and not FeatureGates anymore.
